G02.note: the circ should touch the c7 point in the back, the neck side points at the base and the neck front and create a smooth neckline all around

G06.note: too low, same as waist. lets skip this measurement entirely. its too difficult to measure without touch

G10.note: should create a smooth arc from neck front point to neck base side points

H01.note: should not contour to the chest, its a straight measurementfrom neck to bust and bust to waist

H02.note: should follow the curve of the chest and underbust (as if the tape measure was between the breasts)

H05.note: should be From Neck Side straight down (perpendicular to floor) front to Waist level

H06.note:
From Neck Side over Bustpoint to Waist level, forming a straight line
meaning: straight line to bust point from neck side and follow that angle to the waist

H07.note: measurement goes straight down to touch the line created by G03

H09.note: measurement goes straight down to touch the line created by G04

H12.note: remove this measurement entirely, we will skip the rib level

H14.note: straight from neck side down to touch the line from G04

H15.note: straight down from neck side to touch line from G03

H16.note: straight from center of the shoulder angled toward bust apex but ending at G03 line

H17.note: From Shoulder Tip, curving around Armscye Back, then down to Waist Side

H18.note: From Neck Side straight down back to Waist level (not angled)

H20.note: remove this measurement, we dont know where the scapula is

H21.note: should go straight down from neck back to G03 line at the back

H23.note: should go straight down from neck back to G04 line at the back

H25.note: lowbust point at the back (H25 line in center back) to waist back

H27.note: straight down from neck side to G04

H28.note: straight down from neck side to G03

H29.note: remove measurement, we dont know where the scapula is

H32.note: should go down the side seam from waist to G08

H33.note: straight down from waist back to G08

H34.note:
straight down from waist to G09 
Requires tape to cover the gap between
buttocks.

H35.note: along side seam from waist to G09 (following the body curve)

H39.note: Vertical distance between Neck Back point Y and Shoulder Tip

H41.note: straight down from neck to I08

I03.note: From Armscye to Armscye at narrowest width across chest, about halfway between neck center front and G03 at the same axis as neck

I07.note: should be across the back, not the top of the shoulders

I08.note: should be from armscye to armscye parallel to the floor halfway between neck back point and G03 at the back

I09.note: should not go down but straight from armfold to armfold

I13.note: straight measurement, do not follow the curvature of the shoulder.

J02.note: straight measurement from neck side to buspoint, but should not cut the bust

J03.note: curve down from bustpoint to touch G05, molding around the bust curve

J04.note:
From Bustpoint to straight down to Waist level, forming a straight line (not curving
along the body)

J10.note: straight line is correct, but should not cut into the bust but sit on top

J11.note: straight line is correct, but should not cut into the bust but sit on top

K01.note: should form a diagonal, its curving too much around the bust

K02.note: should form a diagonal, its curving too much around the bust

K03.note: should form a diagonal, its curving too much around the bust

K10.note: line should go from neck side to seam line (same place as underarm) at bust level G04

K13.note: line should go from neck side to seam line (same place as underarm) at bust level G04 at the back

L11.note: circ should measure at armpit level cutting the arm tube perpendicular to the arm itself

L13.note: should not be parallel to the floor but perpendicular to the arm

L15.note: should not be parallel to the floor but perpendicular to the arm

L16.note: curve from shoulder tip down the arm until L11 level

M02.note: From Waist Side along curve to Hip level then straight down to floor. Meaning we follow the curve from waist to hip and then straight down

N08.note:
this should be a formula, not a measurement. Vertical distance from Waist side down to Crotch level. Use formula (Height: Waist
side - Leg: Crotch to floor)

O01.note: should go around the neck, not under the arm

P01.note: should go to the center front of G03, between the apex points

P09.note: Measure in a curve from Armfold Left Front through Bust Front curved back up to Armfold Right Front

P12.note: should go from armscye front over shoulder tip to armscye back
